title: maruta cotula
intro: Maruta cotula, also known as buttonweed or button plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of maruta cotula include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as treating digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of maruta cotula include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
